title: Claim Promotion Record
description: Tracks the lifecycle of a claim from raw artifact through draft claim to promoted PPW finding. See docs/architecture/claim-promotion.md for gate definitions.

promotionId.description: Stable kebab-case identifier for this promotion record.

claimId.description: ID of the PPW claim record this promotion record tracks (references claims.json).

originModuleId.description: ID of the evidence module this claim originated from.

promotionStatus.description: Current stage in the claim promotion lifecycle.

reviewStatus.description: PPW review gate status, aligned with claims.json reviewStatus vocabulary.

sourceRefs.description: Source IDs from bibliography/sources.csl.json that ground this claim.

passageRefs.description: Passage IDs from passages.json that this claim derives from.

artifactRefs.description: Corpus artifact IDs (from corpus-artifact.schema.json) that provide the evidentiary basis for this claim.

missingEvidenceReason.description: Required when promotionStatus is blocked and source/passage/artifact refs are absent. Explains why evidence cannot be linked.

limitations.description: Known scope limits, evidentiary gaps, or generalizability constraints.

counterclaimIds.description: IDs of counterclaim records (from counterclaims.json) that qualify or contest this claim.

scoreImpact.description: Anticipated or confirmed impact on PPW scores if this claim is promoted.

variableId.description: Theory variable this claim bears on.

expectedDirection.description: Direction of expected score change upon promotion.

confidenceNote.description: Brief rationale for the expected score impact.

promotionNotes.description: Free-text notes about promotion decisions, deferred gates, or reviewer guidance.
